expectations.text: Identifies that the model has ZERO named ranges — a fundamental IDFA violation
expectations.evidence: Report states: 'ISSUE 6: No Named Ranges. None of the assumption cells use named ranges.'

expectations.text: Flags the hardcoded values 0.59 and 0.58 in the COGS formulas (D7, E7) as layer isolation violations
expectations.evidence: ERROR 1 (Critical): 'D7 uses =D6*0.59 (59%) instead of =D6*$B$4 (60%)' and 'E7 uses =E6*0.58 (58%) instead of =E6*$B$4 (60%)'.

expectations.text: Identifies that ALL formulas use cell-coordinate references instead of Named Ranges
expectations.evidence: Formula Map shows all formulas using cell refs (B2, C6, B3, B4, $B$10, etc.). Issue 6 confirms no named ranges exist.

expectations.text: Flags the WACC formula for LaTeX verification since it contains absolute cell references ($B$10, $B$12, etc.)
expectations.evidence: The without-skill report does not mention LaTeX verification. It shows the WACC formula and notes it uses absolute addressing, but does not flag it for LaTeX verification specifically.

expectations.text: Notes the single-sheet structure violates IDFA three-layer separation (Assumptions / Calculations / Output)
expectations.evidence: The report does not mention IDFA three-layer separation. It describes the single-sheet structure but does not frame it as a layer-separation violation.

expectations.text: Provides a retrofitting plan that proposes Named Range names following IDFA conventions (Inp_ for inputs, Variable_Dimension for calculations)
expectations.evidence: The report suggests adding named ranges (e.g., 'RevenueGrowth for B3, COGSPct for B4') but does NOT follow IDFA naming conventions. No Inp_ prefix or Variable_Dimension pattern is used.

expectations.text: Does NOT attempt to perform any calculations internally — only inspects model structure
expectations.evidence: Section 5 'Corrected Values After Fixes' computes and reports corrected numerical values: 'After applying the critical fixes, the model would produce: Y1 Revenue 10,000,000, Y2 COGS 6,600,000...'. The report performs internal calculations to show corrected results.

expectations.text: Produces a compliance score or percentage indicating the model's IDFA adherence level
expectations.evidence: The report uses a general scoring approach (Critical/Medium/Low priority) but does not produce an IDFA compliance score or percentage.
